summary: Comprehensive testing of UX improvements and handover/loss tracking features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UX verified including calendar collapse for managers, BnB click expansion, kit cards, handover dialog, and Quick Actions. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in handover missing items section.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing runtime error
ui_bugs.selector: Select for kit_id in missing items

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: SelectItem value='bnb' instead of empty string in Deployments.js line 963
Handover endpoint correctly creates lost events when report_as_lost=True
Lost events correctly update individual item status to 'lost' and reduce quantity for quantity-tracked items
Quick Actions correctly shows only Transfer/Damage/Lost (Request removed per requirements)
Calendar collapse for managers working correctly after date selection
BnB header click correctly expands to show kit cards immediately
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing deployments and items
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX improvements and handover system fully tested. Handover dialog has kit-level checklist (9 items: gloves, usb_hub, imus, head_camera, l_shaped_wire, laptop, laptop_charger, power_bank, ssds) and BnB-level checklist (3 items: charging_station, power_strip_8_port, power_strip_4_5_port). Missing items section allows flagging items as lost. Quick Actions shows Transfer/Damage/Lost only.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin123
Backend: Manager login with test123
Backend: POST /api/handovers creates handover record
Backend: Handover with missing items works
Backend: GET /api/handovers/by-deployment returns handovers list
Backend: Lost event updates individual item status to 'lost'
Backend: Lost event reduces quantity for quantity-tracked items
Backend: POST /api/shifts/start requires deployment_id (422 without it)
Backend: Full shift lifecycle (Start→Pause→Resume→Stop) works
Backend: GET /api/shifts/by-deployment returns shifts keyed by kit
Backend: Transfer event works
Backend: Damage event updates item status to 'damaged'
Backend: Lost event type works
Backend: Handover with report_as_lost=True creates lost event and updates item status
Frontend: Deployments calendar visible with green dots for dates with deployments
Frontend: Calendar collapses for managers after date selection (Change Date button appears)
Frontend: BnB header click expands to show kit cards immediately
Frontend: Kit cards show status (Not Started/Active/Paused/Completed)
Frontend: Kit cards show timer for active/paused shifts
Frontend: Kit cards show duration for completed shifts
Frontend: Handover buttons (End Shift Handover, Start Shift Handover) visible
Frontend: Handover dialog has 9 kit-level checklist items
Frontend: Handover dialog has 3 BnB-level checklist items (Shared BnB Items)
Frontend: Missing Items section with Add button
Frontend: Missing items row has Item dropdown, Quantity input, Kit/BnB dropdown, Lost checkbox, Delete button
Frontend: Quick Actions shows Transfer Item (blue), Report Damage (amber), Report Lost Item (red)
Frontend: Quick Actions does NOT show Request button
Frontend: Report Lost Item dialog has item, location, quantity fields with warning message
features_verified: Deployments: BnB click experience - expand immediately to show kits
Deployments: Calendar collapses for managers after date selection
Kit cards: Start/Pause/Resume/Stop buttons present based on status
Stop button: Properly ends shift and calculates duration
Quick Actions: Shows Transfer, Damage, Lost (NOT Request)
Report Lost Item: Creates lost event and updates item status
Handover: Kit-level checklist with 9 items (gloves, usb_hub, imus, head_camera, l_shaped_wire, laptop, laptop_charger, power_bank, ssds)
Handover: BnB-level checklist with 3 items (charging_station, power_strip_8_port, power_strip_4_5_port)
Handover: Missing items can be flagged and optionally reported as lost
Backend: Lost event updates item status to 'lost' for individual items

bug_fixed.description: SelectItem in missing items section had empty string value causing 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' runtime error
bug_fixed.fix: Changed SelectItem value from empty string to 'bnb' and added logic to convert back to empty string when storing
